facts.text: Commons:Welcome - Wikimedia Commons Jump to content Main menu Main menu move to sidebar hide Navigate Main page Welcome Community portal Village pump Help center Participate Upload file Recent changes Latest files Random file Contact us Special pages In Wikipedia Аԥсшәа Afrikaans Alemannisch Алтай тил Aragonés अंगिका العربية الدارجة مصرى অসমীয়া Asturianu Azərbaycanca تۆرکجه Башҡортса Boarisch Bikol Central Беларуская (тарашкевіца) Беларуская Български भोजपुरी Banjar ပအိုဝ်ႏဘာႏသာႏ বাংলা བོད་ཡིག Català Нохчийн Cebuano کوردی Словѣньскъ / ⰔⰎⰑⰂⰡⰐⰠⰔⰍⰟ Чӑвашла Cymraeg Dansk Deutsch Zazaki ދިވެހިބަސް Ελληνικά English Español Euskara فارسی Suomi Føroyskt Français Nordfriisk Frysk 贛語 Galego Avañe'ẽ Bahasa Hulontalo 𐌲𐌿𐍄𐌹𐍃𐌺 ગુજરાતી עברית हिन्दी Magyar Հայերեն Interlingua Bahasa Indonesia ꆇꉙ Ilokano ГӀалгӀай Íslenska Italiano 日本語 Jawa Qaraqalpaqsha Tyap Қазақша ភាសាខ្មែរ ಕನ್ನಡ 한국어 کٲشُر Kurdî Кыргызча Lëtzebuergesch Lietuvių Latviešu Māori Македонски Монгол Bahasa Melayu Malti မြန်မာဘာသာ مازِرونی नेपाली Nederlands Norsk nynorsk Norsk bokmål Diné bizaad Chi-Chewa ଓଡ଼ିଆ Ирон ਪੰਜਾਬੀ Kapampangan Polski Português Runa Simi Română Русский Саха тыла Scots سنڌي Davvisámegiella Sängö Srpskohrvatski / српскохрватски တႆး සිංහල Simple English Slovenčina Slovenščina Soomaaliga Shqip Српски / srpski Sunda Svenska Kiswahili ꠍꠤꠟꠐꠤ தமிழ் తెలుగు Тоҷикӣ ไทย Türkmençe Tagalog Türkçe Татарча / tatarça Удмурт ئۇيغۇرچە / Uyghurche Українська اردو Oʻzbekcha / ўзбекча Tiếng Việt Walon Winaray Wolof 吴语 მარგალური ייִדיש Yorùbá 粵語 中文 Edit links Search Search English Appearance Donate Create account Log in Personal tools Donate Create account Log in Commons : Welcome Project page Discussion English Read View source View history Tools Tools move to sidebar hide Actions Read View source View history General What links here Related changes Permanent link Page information Get shortened URL Print/export Create a book Download as PDF Printable version In other projects Wikimedia Foundation MediaWiki Meta-Wiki Multilingual Wikisource Wikispecies Wikidata Wikifunctions Wikimania Wikinews Wikipedia Wikiquote Wikisource Wikivoyage Wiktionary Wikidata item Appearance move to sidebar hide From Wikimedia Commons, the free media repository Translate this page ; This page contains changes which are not marked for translation.

Community portal introduction Help desk Village pump copyright proposals technical Administrators' noticeboard vandalism user problems blocks and protections Other languages: Alemannisch Avañe'ẽ Bahasa Indonesia Bahasa Melayu Banjar Boarisch Cymraeg Deutsch English Esperanto Igbo Kadazandusun Kiswahili Kreyòl ayisyen Kumoring Luganda Lëtzebuergesch Madhurâ Na Vosa Vakaviti Nederlands Plattdüütsch Sunda Tiếng Việt Tyap Türkçe Zazaki aragonés asturianu azərbaycanca català dansk español euskara français galego hornjoserbsce hrvatski interlingua italiano lietuvių magyar norsk bokmål norsk nynorsk occitan oʻzbekcha / ўзбекча polski português shqip sicilianu slovenčina slovenščina suomi svenska toki pona íslenska čeština Ελληνικά авар алтай тил башҡортса беларуская (тарашкевіца) български гӀалгӀай къарачай-малкъар кыргызча лезги македонски олык марий русский српски / srpski татарча / tatarça тоҷикӣ українська עברית ئۇيغۇرچە / Uyghurche اردو العربية تۆرکجه فارسی پښتو کٲشُر अंगिका नेपाली मराठी हिन्दी অসমীয়া বাংলা ਪੰਜਾਬੀ తెలుగు ಕನ್ನಡ ತುಳು മലയാളം සිංහල ไทย ཇོང་ཁ တႆး ပအိုဝ်ႏဘာႏသာႏ ⵜⴰⵎⴰⵣⵉⵖⵜ ⵜⴰⵏⴰⵡⴰⵢⵜ 中文 日本語 粵語 閩南語 / Bân-lâm-gí 한국어 What is Wikimedia Commons?
Wikimedia Commons is a media file repository making available public domain and freely licensed educational media content (images, sound and video clips) to everyone, in their own language .
It acts as a common repository for the various projects of the Wikimedia Foundation , but you do not need to belong to one of those projects to use media hosted here.

rules.text: - It acts as a common repository for the various projects of the Wikimedia Foundation , but you do not need to belong to one of those projects to use media hosted here.
